title: helichrysum inodorum
intro: Helichrysum inodorum, also known as the yellow furze or yellow mountain daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum inodorum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Helichrysum inodorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
